title: Cobblemon Fossil Hybrids!
description: A addon that lets you create your own cobblemon hybrids!
body:
**In this addon, you will be able to create brand new cobblemon species using combinations of fossils thanks to the fossil machine added in cobblemon's Ruins and Revival update!** 

Give your favourite fossil Pokemon a coat of fresh paint by creating **abominations from beyond this world**, galar style! 

To create them, simply need all of the cobblemon resurrection machine needs
_(see here: https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Resurrection_Machine)_ and then! Place a compatible pair of fossils inside of the machine (for example, Sail fossil + Root fossil for **Leemaura**) and watch as the magic happens! Currently, this addons adds 3 brand new line of fossil Pokemon, with each being much more than the sum of their parts;

**- Sail Fossil + Root Fossil -> Leemaura (Grass/Fairy) -> Crinaurus (Grass/Fairy) are fusion of Amaura/Aurorus and Lileep/Cradily**

![Leemaura-Remodel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54484ca0ca15ff3c35d682b9e55fbbf52d562898.gif)

**- Skull Fossil + Cover Fossil -> Tirtonidos (Water/Steel) -> Ramcosta (Water/Steel) are fusions of Cranidos/Rampardos and Tirtouga/Carracosta**

![Tirtonidos-Remodel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8160e3af7c6482d968baa7c581499192961bdf52.gif)

**- Plume Fossil + Jaw Fossil -> Tyrarch (Dragon) -> Archerantrum (Dragon/Fighting) are fusions of Archen/Archeops and Tyrunt/Tyrantrum**

![Tyrarch-Remodel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a97367489376529cd347986cbd245ab9af2d03.gif)

This datapack and its contents must not be sold in any way. If you come across a violation of this policy, please report it to us or Mojang so that an appropriate action can be decided.
